topic: My backyard is bigger every time I mow it and the back fence keeps moving away
title: My Backyard Is Bigger Every Time I Mow It | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My backyard is bigger every time I mow it. The back fence keeps moving farther away.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a suburban backyard at dusk stretching unusually far to a distant fence, mowed grass, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Small house, small yard. The mow took ten minutes when I bought it.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small modest house with a compact grassy backyard, daylight, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a push lawn mower on cut grass, dim daylight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One Saturday it took an hour. The grass ran on past where the fence should be.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a backyard lawn extending far past a low fence into open grass, overcast light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I walked to the back fence.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person walking toward a distant back fence across a long lawn, only a silhouette, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was twice as far as last week. New grass, never cut.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an expanse of untouched tall grass beyond a fence line, grey light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drove a stake at the old fence line.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wooden stake driven into a lawn at a boundary line, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next week the stake was a hundred feet from the fence.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a wooden stake standing far from a distant fence across a wide lawn, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The yard keeps growing. I cannot see the back of it from the house anymore.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an enormous backyard lawn vanishing toward a far tree line, the house small behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week I found a second house at the far end. It was mine. The lights were on.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a distant identical house at the far end of a long lawn at dusk, its windows lit, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stopped mowing. The grass out there grows tall and fast.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an overgrown tall grass yard at twilight, no house visible nearby, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At night I see someone mowing near the far house. He waves. He has my walk.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a distant figure pushing a mower near a far lit house at night, one hand raised in a wave, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
